description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a boxy, modernist design and a flat roof. The exterior is painted a light blue color, accented by white window frames and black trim along the roof and base. The upper story is set back from the lower, creating a stepped profile, and features four small chimneys or vents on the roof. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on each visible side, with the main entry door located on the longer side of the building. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with a smooth, painted finish and minimal decorative elements. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story urban house with a flat roof, light blue exterior, and symmetrical white-framed windows. The design is boxy and functional, with black trim and a stepped upper story.
description_view_0: Front view showing two stories, four symmetrically placed windows on each level, and black trim along the roof and base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the main entry door, six windows, and the stepped setback of the upper story with visible roof vents.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal features, showing the flat roof and the stepped profile of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a door, six windows, and four roof vents, highlighting the building's boxy shape and setback upper story.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door on the long side, no porch or steps, minimal trim, and no decorative elements.
